violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Chicken was relocated to a sheet pan and placed in the walk-in cooler to rapidly cool. Proper cooling methods were reviewed with the person in charge at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following items have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1)inside and outside of cold hold units 2)shelves throughout the facility Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were moved to the ware-washing area to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken wings were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Items Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

A fly ribbon trap observed above the food prep sink. Insect control devices shall be installed so that: The devices are not located over a FOOD preparation area; and Dead insects and insect fragments are prevented from being impelled onto or falling on exposed FOOD; clean EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, and LINENS; and unwrapped SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the interior and exterior of the refrigeration units, the shelving of the cookline, and bottom of prep tables have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

The floors under the wok line, under 3-bay sink in the bar area, around the ice machine and under the main kitchen ware-washing area has an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023
